description.value:
Category: Clan
Prerequisite: Koyumi Clan, Level 4+
You have decided to tether your weapon to your spirit, your determination manifesting in an even more powerful weapon. You gain the following benefits:

  • Increase your Constitution or Wisdom score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
  • Over the course of a short rest you perform a 1 hour ritual that drives your spirit into the bow itself, it glows a brilliant blue and is now considered your Eternal Bow. This bond is unbreakable, and cannot be changed.

  • Your Eternal Bow gains a +1 to attack and damage rolls and you may summon it or unsummon it at will, as a free action.

  • Your Eternal Bow has its quality rank increased by 1 and this quality rank increases when you would reach the Enhancement Seal Minimum Level Requirement the quality is automatically increased to that quality.

  • Your Eternal Bow now does force damage in addition to piercing damage and attack rolls with Bukijutsu that use your Eternal Bow as a component ignore penalties imposed on you from hostile creatures.

  • If your Eternal Bow would somehow be destroyed or you are disarmed of it you can spend 1 chakra die to restore it and return it to your possession as a free action.
